parameters.query: SELECT doc_type, TO_CHAR(sap_update_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS month_key, COUNT(*) AS dp_count FROM oms.orders WHERE company_code = current_setting('app.company_code') AND sap_update_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY doc_type, TO_CHAR(sap_update_date, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY doc_type, month_key

SET NOCOUNT ON;
SELECT 'SO' AS doc_type,
       CONVERT(varchar(7), UpdateDate, 120) AS month_key,
       COUNT(DISTINCT DocEntry) AS sap_count
FROM ORDR WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE UpdateDate >= '{{ $json.start_date }}'
GROUP BY CONVERT(varchar(7), UpdateDate, 120)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'PO',
       CONVERT(varchar(7), UpdateDate, 120),
       COUNT(DISTINCT DocEntry)
FROM OPOR WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE UpdateDate >= '{{ $json.start_date }}'
GROUP BY CONVERT(varchar(7), UpdateDate, 120)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'WO',
       CONVERT(varchar(7), T0.UpdateDate, 120),
       COUNT(DISTINCT T0.DocEntry)
FROM OWOR T0 WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN WOR1 T1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry AND T1.ItemType = 4
WHERE T0.UpdateDate >= '{{ $json.start_date }}'
GROUP BY CONVERT(varchar(7), T0.UpdateDate, 120)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'TR',
       CONVERT(varchar(7), UpdateDate, 120),
       COUNT(DISTINCT DocEntry)
FROM OWTQ WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE UpdateDate >= '{{ $json.start_date }}'
GROUP BY CONVERT(varchar(7), UpdateDate, 120)
ORDER BY doc_type, month_key
